description: Fun and Engagement Features (items 91-100): Music trivia quiz, guess the song game, music bingo, listening challenges, Easter eggs, album of the day, music memory game, countdown to release, year in review, and musical mood ring.
steps: 1. Create app/games/trivia/page.tsx and app/components/games/MusicTrivia.tsx: daily music trivia quiz - 'Which artist released this album?' Show album artwork, provide 4 artist choices. Generate from listening history or random iTunes searches. Track score in localStorage.

2. Create app/games/guess/page.tsx and app/components/games/GuessTheSong.tsx: play 5 seconds of a track preview, user guesses the song from 4 options. Use Audio API with setTimeout to stop after 5s. Score tracking.

3. Create app/games/bingo/page.tsx and app/components/games/MusicBingo.tsx: 5x5 bingo card with criteria ('Listen to a jazz song', 'Find a song from the 80s', 'Play a song over 5 minutes'). Mark squares when criteria met. Track in localStorage.

4. Create lib/challenges.ts and app/components/games/ListeningChallenges.tsx: weekly challenges like 'Listen to 5 jazz albums this week' with progress bars. Check progress against playback history. Show on dashboard page.

5. Create app/components/EasterEggs.tsx: Konami code (up up down down left right left right B A) unlocks retro theme. Typing 'vinyl' in search triggers special vinyl mode. Add event listeners in layout.

6. Create app/components/discover/AlbumOfTheDay.tsx: featured album each day (use date as seed to pick from curated list or iTunes top albums). Show editorial-style card with description. Add to home page.

7. Create app/games/memory/page.tsx and app/components/games/MemoryGame.tsx: card-flip memory matching game using album artworks. Grid of face-down cards, flip two to match pairs. Generate from favorite albums or random.

8. Create app/components/discover/ReleaseCountdown.tsx: show countdown timers for upcoming album releases. Hardcode a few notable upcoming releases or parse from Apple RSS. Show days/hours/minutes remaining.

9. Create app/components/favorites/analytics/YearInReview.tsx: end-of-year summary with total stats, top 5 artists, top 5 songs, genres explored, total hours, and highlight moments. Styled as a celebratory page.

10. Create app/components/MoodRing.tsx: animated ring on profile that changes color based on recent listening mood (energetic=red, chill=blue, happy=yellow, sad=purple). Derive mood from genre of recent tracks.
acceptance_criteria: Music trivia quiz presents daily questions with 4 choices
Guess the song plays 5 seconds of audio with multiple choice
Music bingo card tracks criteria completion
Listening challenges show progress bars toward goals
Konami code and 'vinyl' search activate Easter eggs
Album of the day shows a featured album with description
Memory game works with album artwork card matching
Release countdown shows timers for upcoming albums
Year in review generates annual listening summary
Mood ring animates based on recent listening genre
verification: bun run lint passes with zero errors
bun run build succeeds with zero errors
findings: All 10 fun and engagement features implemented and verified. React 19 strict linting required using useSyncExternalStore pattern instead of setState in effects for all components that read from localStorage. The useSyncExternalStore with subscribeNoop/getClient/getServer pattern is the standard way to handle hydration-dependent data in this codebase. MusicBingo needed a guard in checkBingo for empty arrays during SSR. GuessTheSong needed explicit string[] type assertion for Set spread. Easter egg CSS uses retro-theme and vinyl-mode classes on html element. Build and lint both pass with zero errors.
